2136420.name: FIRE The First Dreamer
2136420.description:
“Under tangled bramble, the Boar grinds the earth with relentless purpose. Fire does not only burn — sometimes it charges.”

Wishlist to break through what stands in your way.

Embark on a boundless open world adventure across the sprawling expanse of over 40 square miles nestled within the majestic Preseli mountains in Wales. Decode enigmatic messages etched in an ancient language, unveiling secrets as old as time itself. Harness the primal magic of totem animals, summoning their power to aid in your quest for survival amidst the untamed wilderness. Traverse a landscape steeped in the echoes of our forebears, each corner brimming with the whispers of forgotten tales. Inspired by a remarkable true story, let the flames of passion and destiny ignite your dreams as you journey through this immersive odyssey.

But remember, Let Fire guides your dreams

FEATURES

  • Immersive Exploration: Venture into a vast open world spanning over 40 square miles, set within the mystical Preseli mountains of Wales.

  • Epic Journey: Discover a landscape filled with the whispers of our ancestors.

  • Ancient Mysteries: Uncover enigmatic messages in an ancient language, revealing secrets to aid your journey.

  • Totemic Magic: Harness the primal power of totem animals to aid in survival, hunting, foraging, and unraveling the mysteries of the land.

  • Mythical Beings and Legends: Encounter mythical creatures holding the keys to unlocking the secrets of living a balanced life.

  • Dynamic Storytelling: Experience a captivating narrative inspired by a true story.

  • Sacred Practices: Engage in sacred practices designed to tether the mind and maintain harmony with nature, drawing upon ancient wisdom to guide your path.

  • Environmental Interaction: Interact with a living, breathing world, where every action influences the balance between you and the natural world.

  • Dream-Based Guidance: Let the Fire guide your dreams, leading you to uncover hidden truths and awaken the dormant Dragon, whose wisdom holds the key to restoring harmony.

  • Visual Splendor: Immerse yourself in stunning visuals and atmospheric landscapes, bringing the ancient world to life with unparalleled beauty and depth.

  • Meaningful Choices: Navigate moral dilemmas and ethical quandaries as you strive to find your way through the world.

In a time long forgotten, when the world was still young and newly sung into form by the Gods, humanity lived gently within nature’s pulse. They moved with the tides, the seasons, and the shifting winds — yet unlike the other creatures, they were fragile. They had no claws for defence, no fur for warmth, no wings to escape the storm.

Seeing this, the Gods gathered with the spirits of ocean and mountain, plant and animal, and forged a sacred pact. Each being would offer humanity a gift — warmth, shelter, food, guidance — and in return humans would honour and protect the balance of the world. Thus the first totems were given, and the bond between humans and the living land was set.

But the Gods saw a deeper truth. Humanity carried within them a spark none of the other beings had: the gift of the mind — the ability to imagine, remember, reason. A gift bright enough to build worlds… or to break them. They knew that if the mind ever drifted free from nature’s rhythm, it could lead the people astray.

So the Gods gave Fire — not only to warm and cook, but as a living presence, a guide, a ritual tether to keep the mind balanced with the breath of the earth. And they asked the Dragon, eldest of the ancient beings, to watch over what humans could not carry. The Dragon agreed to hold the deepest secrets of a good life — to guard them in the dark, and return them if humanity ever forgot the path.

For a long age, the pact held. Dragons roamed the skies, spirits walked openly, and humans lived in harmony, guided by ritual and flame.

But epochs passed. Memories faded. Power whispered. Rituals were abandoned, Fire was taken for granted, and the mind — unanchored — wandered into jealousy and greed. The old beings withdrew into myth, waiting for a time when they would be needed again.

As imbalance spread, nature rose in warning: winds that tore, floods that reshaped valleys, Fire that cleansed. From this upheaval, a new age dawned — one of uncertainty, but also of possibility.

Now, in this era of renewal, echoes of the old pact return in the dreams of a chosen few. Drawn to a land where the presence of the Gods still lingers, guided by the quiet voice of Fire, you are one of these seekers.

The Dragon sleeps, but its promise remains.

Let Fire light your way as you journey to awaken what was forgotten — and rediscover the secrets of living in harmony with a world that still remembers you.
